tema: THIS AI REPOSITORY LITERALLY BUILDS WEBSITES FROM DRAWINGS!!!
timeline: Peter
STEWIE! STEWIE! LOOK AT THIS! I JUST DREW A PICTURE OF A FART... AND NOW... IT IS A REAL WEBSITE! HOLY CRAP!
Stewie
Oh, for heavens sake, Peter! Stop shouting in my ear! It is called Screenshot-to-Code... and it uses AI to turn images into clean code!
Peter
WAIT... SO YOU ARE SAYING... I DO NOT NEED TO LEARN THE... THE... JABBA-SCRIPPY STUFF?! THIS IS AMAZING!
Stewie
It is JAVASCRIPT, you oversized man-child! And yes... this repository is trending on GitHub right now because it is absolute MAGIC!
Peter
OH MY GOD! I AM GOING TO USE THIS TO RECREATE THE ENTIRE INTERNET... BUT WITH MORE PICS OF CHICKEN WINGS!
Stewie
Focus, fat man! It supports React, Tailwind, and even Vue! It is literally changing how we build software... FOREVER!
Peter
BUT STEWIE... LOOK AT THE STARS! OVER FIFTY THOUSAND STARS! THAT IS MORE STARS THAN I CAN COUNT ON MY TOES!
Stewie
Well... considering you can only count to three... that is not impressive! But the repo is... you just drag a screenshot in... and BOOM... full code!
Peter
WOW... I CAN FINALLY START MY NEW BUSINESS... PETER-NET DOT COM! STEWIE... HOW DO I CLICK THE FORK BUTTON?!
Stewie
Just put the mouse down, Peter! You are going to break the entire repository with your sheer... agonizing... incompetence!
